programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Adam, the son of one of Dodge City's revered citizens returns. But upon arriving someone takes a shot at him. The man who shot him, Stark, is a bounty hunter. It seems that Adam was in jail in Texas and broke out, and Stark aims to bring him back.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe and Adam's differences in politics lead to unrest in the house. When Joe is picked to go to a convention on the statehood of Nevada, will his relationship with a admitted Confederate's daughter weigh his decision?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: The Lost Treasure Of Canyon Town
programme.desc: In a ghost town, Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of the town's 20-year-old mystery of a lost gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Shadrack Bennington has been a cavalier of the open road, not wanting to be tied down until he joins the wagon train, heading for San Francisco and a future even he couldn't anticipate.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A jewel thief is trapped in an air-conditioning duct. Two battered men continue their brawl in the hospital. A man ruins his cast by going surfing. Dr. Brackett treats a woman with a neurological disorder. Radioactivity impedes the rescue of a lab worker. Johnny misses the end of an 'Adam-12' episode.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Lost behind enemy lines, Hawkeye and Margaret form a personal truce and seek shelter in a roadside hut."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Margaret and Hawkeye seek solace from enemy fire in each other's arms and end up, briefly, as lovers. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Charles hands B.J. $200, he begins to take advantage. Everyone gets together and persuades Charles to play poker. He has incredible beginner's luck until Radar discovers that Charles whistles loudly when he bluffs. They all win back their money and then some.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th has just ended a rough three-day ordeal with wounded soldiers. Charles plays a French horn and drives Hawkeye and B.J. crazy. They refuse to bathe until the French horn playing is stopped; the two are even forced to eat outside because of their unhygienic presences.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stubborn but charming lady speeder makes life difficult for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Frank Myers is about to get evicted by the city council when he discovers an old bond that the city of Mayberry issued 100 years ago. Mayberry now owes him $350,000 and can't pay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is very excited about graduating from the sixth grade. But in order to prevent embarrassment, Mrs. Potts gets help from Drysdale and Diana to get Jethro to miss his sixth grade graduation. She schemes to turn Jed and Jethro’s watches back 45 minutes.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: The only thing Oliver learns at a farming convention is how to get a hangover. He and Lisa meet up with Charlie, a former gangster-turned-farmer, and Wanda, his floozy dancer wife. The more Charlie talks about his farm, the more Oliver's convinced that his shady days are not in the past.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk gets drafted into the German army while working on Hogan's plan to sabotage a ammunition factory.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is hiding a defecting German officer, and convinces Klink that the latter, who looks like Schultz, is really Hitler in disguise.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Carol Channing And Steve Lawrence (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Carol Channing and Steve Lawrence. Originally aired on 10/06/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Hasty Honeymooner
programme.desc: Lucas Tolliver arrives in California from Oklahoma to meet the woman he was matched up with by a computer dating service. The woman, Miliicent Barton, is supposedly a rich widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A convict serving time isolated on an asteroid receives a gift: a robot that looks, sounds and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: When two missionaries arrive at a remote medical mission in the Indian jungle, jealousy leads to murder and a coverup.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a basketball star disappears, his family hires Mannix to hunt him down—before the syndicate does.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon investigates a doctors claim that he is innocent of a death he was charged with concerning a patient he was treating that had slipped into a diabetic coma. Cannon becomes involved in a medical malpractice suit when a young resident physician is charged with making the wrong diagnosis on a woman in an apparent diabetic coma who dies after his treatment. Hired by the hospital facing a two million dollar suit, Cannon hears testimony of the accused Dr. Jeff Reston, played by guest star David Birney, that the woman he treated wore a diabetic's bracelet. She was, in fact, suffering from hypoglycemia. But the bracelet disappeared and none of the nurses attending with Reston can back up his story. Reston then gives Cannon a motive for a possible conspiracy against him. "

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby probes the death of a heavily-insured man that is believed to be an accident.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews rushes to the scene when a woman kills a wanted thief.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A girl's life hangs in the balance as the detectives search for the dog that bit her.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are called to a tavern robbery in progress, and then are jolted by a severe domestic abuse situation they are powerless to stop. In the meantime, they lose track of a naive college girl who has just been carjacked by a convicted rapist.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Because Malloy has allowed his driver's license to expire, Reed has to do the driving on today's busy patrol. They search for an ice cream truck driver who's been trying to sell marijuana to children, get an unexpected reaction from a bank robber, help a man who's had his house completely emptied by his neighbors, deal with a woman who shoots her husband dead and find a live baby in a trashcan.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "A wicked fish gives Bill, Toony, Quizzer, Simon Shock, and Teddy bad dreams!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Miss Landers assigns Beaver's class to write a short essay about the most interesting character they know. While Judy writes about her dad, Beaver debates over whom he should write about. Beaver finally decides to write about Ward, but Beaver isn't sure if Ward is interesting enough.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally becomes the chairman of the blind date committee for an upcoming dance. However, Wally quickly wants to resign from the position when he can't find anyone to go with the new girl, Jill Bartlett.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Watery Witness
programme.desc: Lorna Thomas is a has-been actress who once gave up her baby for adoption and lived to regret it. George Clark discovers that his wife might be Lorna's long-lost daughter and begins to see dollar signs.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle is taken hostage by Ned Billings, who blames Matlock for his brother's suicide after being convicted of murder, thanks to Matlock. Tyler and Julie end up as Ned's hostages, too, and the three try to use tactics they've seen Matlock use in courtrooms and interrogations to help them stay alive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A serial rapist stalks Sparta.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jason helps Verdie research her family tree

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The arrival of the first woman doctor in Dodge City, Dr. Sam McTavish, riles Doc Adams. However, she soon wins his confidence and that of his patients, and the two physicians make a startling medical discovery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss picks up a mail order bride for a friend, but problems arise when the bride decides she has fallen in love with Hoss and has no interest in her husband to be.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two ex-Confederate officers seek revenge on Lucas. McCain was a lieutenant in the 8th Indiana, which defeated the 12th Cavalry 15 years earlier at the Battle of Fort Donaldson.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: While preparing to return to St. Joseph, the men read the story "Wagon Ho" written and printed by Samuel T. Evans about his trip as a naive young Irishman headed west and his experiences and adventure on the trail.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John and Roy bring in a football player who was tackled too hard. A burglar has a heart attack. John wants Roy to apologize for calling him "some kind of nut." Dr. Early treats a hypochondriac. A babysitter brings in a child who has swallowed some pills. Roy and John rescue the occupants of a light plane that crashed in a tree.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In need of a special surgical clamp, Hawkeye and B.J. hire Mr. Shin, a local jewelry dealer, to make it. Days later the clamp is used to save the leg of a wounded soldier. Mr. Shin goes into the surgical supply business.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With British and American casualties heavy, the 4077th's supply of penicillin has been stolen. Father Mulcahy discovers, from Corporal Bryant, the location of some penicillin, and he and Klinger go out in search of it. They are shot at, but safely return with the drug and save the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the arrival of a shipment of records, Radar plays the part of a disc jockey and helps to get everyone through the incredibly long deluge of wounded.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hot Lips, believing herself to be pregnant, asks Hawkeye to test her. The only rabbit available to use for the test is Radar's pet, Fluffy. Meanwhile, Martinson, a patient, holds Charles at gunpoint, demanding he be sent back to Ohio.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After a tiff with Thelma Lou, Barney is victimized by a scheming young couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A ne'er-do-well vagrant has a bad influence on Opie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts leave Hooterville after spending Thanksgiving there. They return to their mansion, telling Drysdale and Jane about the boy Elly started dating. When Drysdale hears of this, he decides to get a country boy to come and court Elly. He employs Dash Riprock to play country boy Homer Noodleman. After the Clampetts are introduced to Homer, Granny wants to meet his father.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A desperate Ralph Monroe joins a computer dating service to meet a husband. Oliver thinks it's a great idea since computers are always right. Lisa thinks they can't possibly take the place of romance, so she challenges Oliver to test their match-up on the electric brain.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's plot to destroy an ammunition train is foiled by Burkhalter's brother-in-law.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses an incredibly original ruse to get Schultz a weeklong furlough in Heidelberg. While there, Schultz is to deliver needed radio parts to the underground.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Carol Channing And Steve Lawrence (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Carol Channing and Steve Lawrence. Originally aired on 10/06/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Burt Payne coaches and owns 10% of a professional football team. His rich wife, Ellen, owns the remainder. Knowing that he's washed up and needing some quick cash, Burt tries to sell his share of the team to a group of investors.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller pestered by the demands of his job and wife longs for time alone to read books.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: In a Brooklyn slum, an aspiring author joins a gang of hoodlums to collect material for a book.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A former championship diver, now disabled, believes she is going to be murdered after receiving death threats.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon reopens an investigation when he discovers a convicted man may be innocent, but then refuses parole. Robert Foxworth is the villain. He plays a murderer, an ex-Green Beret who served in Vietnam with overtones of CIA activity. The murdered man was Cannon's friend, and that brings him into the case. When the convicted murderer turns down a parole, Cannon becomes very curious."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A blind girl is Barnaby's only lead in his search for a missing coed.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews investigates when a local beautician is blamed for a crime.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An infant girl is found in a garbage can; Joe and Bill use the child's blanket to track down the mother.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After beginning the search for a well known suspect who just stole a 600-pound offset printing press, Reed and Malloy try to convince an 85-year-old man to leave the soon-to-be demolished apartment building where he's resided alone for 27 years. Afterward, they pull over a very unusual vehicle, and chase a delivery truck to the end of an unfinished bridge.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are called to a riding stable run by retired actor Slim Berkeley. The owner is careless about trusting people and has $100 and a gold belt buckle stolen. Because of a criminal record in New York his young assistant runs, but when searched nothing is found. A call to a phone booth where the man inside is being attacked leads to a drug arrest and sore jaw for Reed. Reed spots a robbery at a drive-in resulting in a shoot-out.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Someone has killed Mr. Quizzer! Can you solve the mystery? (Don't worry, it's just a game.)"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward and June allow Wally to babysit Beaver one evening while they attend a party. However, things go awry when Beaver gets ready to take a bath. He accidentally lets the bathtub overflow, causing the water to leak onto the bathroom floor and into the downstairs ceiling.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A new school year has the bus service being extended to those students living in town. However, after not even a week, Beaver gets suspended from riding the bus after getting into a fight.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Garrulous Gambler
programme.desc: Larry Benton is a hard-luck guy. He gets in an argument in a poker game and knocks Mike Granger out cold. Then he is informed him that Granger is dead.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend Wally McDaniels, a fellow choir member, after he is arrested for killing the man who had turned him in to the police for stealing rare books.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba travels to Los Angeles to arrest an arsonist. When the man is murdered to keep him from talking Bubba teams up with a pretty insurance investigator to solve the crime.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Elizabeth falls while standing on top of a wood pile and fractures her leg

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A baron gives Matt trouble when Matt wants the man's sons in jail for a crime they committed.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe befriends a young man, Billy Horne, a white man captured and raised by the Shoshones. Meanwhile, Milton Tanner goes after a third of the Ponderosa. Seeing that his new friends are in trouble, Billy takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: Short Rope For A Tall Man
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are in another town to sell a bull to Joe Lovering. While there, Mark buys two horses from Mr. Schneider. Neither Mark nor his father knows that the horses have been illegally bought and resold to them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot—and a lot of gall.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Adams' "distant" cousin Horace arrives hoping to be a wagon master. His trading skills allow him to steal the crew and vendors from Adams, but when Adams confronts him with the decisions he must make on the trail, there are second thoughts.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John rescue a man whose engine has fallen on him during his car repair work.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After a delay of three weeks, five sacks of mail arrive, and everyone in camp reacts to good and bad news from home. Hawkeye receives love letters addressed to another Benjamin Pierce, another man has approached B.J.'s wife, and Radar's mom has found a boyfriend.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With a temporary transfer of personnel between the 4077th and the 8063rd, Captain Roy Dupree replaces Hawkeye, while Lorraine Anderson makes eyes at Charles. Fearing this to be permanent, Charles and B.J. successfully conspire to have Dupree permanently removed from the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter is upset when General Waldo Kent informs him that people in the 4077th are complaining about his leadership. Potter returns to camp and discovers that the complaints are coming from a Corporal (actually Lieutenant) Benson, who had been sent by a disturbed Colonel Frank Webster.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles takes amphetamines to keep up his energy level, and even drugs Radar's mouse, "Daisy," so that it will win a race against a Marine's mouse, "Sluggo."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are honored for achieving the lowest crime-rate in the country.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy learns a great deal about Thelma Lou's cousin.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants a new car, embarrassed by the truck. He buys two new cars for two different images he is trying. But Jed tells him to just get a few new parts for the truck. Granny, who is celebrating her birthday, believes that they are planning to replace her. But she learns the truth, and wants the truck to stay the way it was. Jethro ends up getting a whole new front for the truck, and when Jed tells him to fix it, he gets a whole new back.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Lisa hears a women's liberation speaker, she demands that Oliver share the household chores while she runs the farm. While he meets with nothing but red tape while trying to build a tool shed, Lisa gets the permit and completes the building with ease. A skeptical Oliver is in disbelief that his wife is so successful at "men's work".

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks a French pilot's girl into camp and gets Klink to marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: The Most Escape-proof Camp I've Ever Escaped From
programme.desc: Colonel Klink's "no escape" record is jeopardized when Malcom Flood, a British escape artist, lands in Stalag 13 and intends to continue his impressive escape record, a plan likely to endanger Hogan's scheduled rendezvous with an OSS agent.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Ken Berry And Cass Elliot (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Ken Berry and Cass Elliot. Originally aired on 10/13/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wrathful Wraith
programme.desc: Louise Self finds herself in the unfortunate position of having to stand trial for the murder of her husband twice.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A physician tries to stop her hallucinatory vision of an all-female society from becoming a reality.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A witness against a crime boss is murdered just before he can reveal the syndicate's plans.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Mrs. Manning, a former policewoman, hires Cannon when her husband becomes the victim of blackmailers. The man is an electrician specialized in wiretapping. Three criminals find that the electrician has recorded one of his conversations.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: As a thief awaits trial, his accomplice puts out a contract on the only witness to the crime.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews uses taxi drivers as bait for criminals.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon track down a department store employee who stole $100,000 worth of merchandise in six months.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: There's been a rash of cracked safes in the area, and Malloy thinks the suspect is someone who lives in the neighborhood who now claims to be a reformed family man. In the meantime, he and Reed track down a female robbery suspect, who turns out to be a victim herself.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy stares down the barrel of a rifle during the search for gloved robbers who are able to make off with $500 from a tavern in a stolen car. He and Reed also try to apprehend a group of anti-semites before their repeated shakedown attempts cause further damage to a defiant Holocaust survivor.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony throw a spooktacular Halloween Party with the help of a special expert!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After leaving the cap off the ink, Beaver is grounded to the house for a whole day after spilled ink ruins some of Ward's papers. However, Larry and Beaver sneak out to the movies and when Beaver wins a bike, he must find a way to keep it a secret from his parents.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver's class holds a "Most Beautiful Baby" contest in which each student is supposed to bring in a baby picture. To make the deadline, June picks out a cute picture of Beaver at the last minute and sends it to Miss Landers, not realizing that the cute picture may cause Beaver embarrassment.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Blushing Pearls
programme.desc: Mitsuo Kamuri has been seeing a great deal of Grover Nichols, son of wealthy businessman Hudson Nichols. Nichols doesn't approve of his son's relationship and when Mitsuo is "caught" with a string of valuable pearls belonging to Mrs. Nichols, he agrees to absolve her if she stops seeing his son.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock reluctantly agrees to spend the weekend as part of a murder mystery with Cliff, Leanne and three people who each paid $10,000 for the privilege of matching wits with the famous Ben Matlock. When the pretend victim turns up dead, Matlock and his team must determine which of the three paying customers is the guilty party.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet tries to keep Eugene from giving up when his father faces the death penalty. And the police search for three suspects in connection to a robbery/murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Elizabeth falls while standing on top of a wood pile and fractures her leg; Doctors doubt her ability to walk ever again.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A train that Matt, Doc and Festus are riding is stopped by Indians who request two passengers be turned over to their custody for selling them poisonous whiskey.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Mexican freedom fighters loyal to Benito Juárez take over the Ponderosa, gravely wound Little Joe and force Ben to guide them to a wagon train loaded with gold being smuggled to California by Emperor Maximilian.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is marked for death: he was foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Arrogant British Colonel Albert Farnsworth causes an indian attack that results in the capture of a young girl by the Cheyenne and the mortal wounding of his long time aide.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The station adopts a stray dog, which they name Boot. The firemen rescue a boy from a hole; he turns out to be an abused child. Roy and John rescue another boy whose head is stuck in a basement window. Dr. Early extracts a child's arm from a steering wheel. At a brush fire, Boot helps locate an injured hiker, and then leaves with a hook and ladder truck.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the possibility of contaminated morphine, the doctors at the 4077th administer placebos to the patients, which seems to work. Meanwhile, a new soldier, "Boots" Miller, is released on a Section Eight.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye undergoes a drastic change when he becomes temporary commander of the 4077th, and learns about the tedious bureaucracy and accompanying headaches that Colonel Potter deals with daily.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye becomes so disgusted with the stalled Panmunjon peace talks that he impulsively takes matters into his own hands, and goes to the meetings to lend a hand.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter meets a female soldier of the same age and interests as himself named Lil. The others in the camp think that he might be cheating on Mildred, even though his friendship with Lil is completely platonic. Meanwhile, Hawkeye tries to find out what B.J.'s initials stand for. As it turns out, he was named after his parents, Bea and Jay Hunnicutt.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee falls for traveling handyman Henry Wheeler, Andy soon learns that Wheeler is not as nice as he appears.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: One of Andy's big-city fishing buddies invites him to join the Esquire Club, an exclusive Raleigh men's organization. Barney also is asked to join but tries a little too hard to fit in.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts and Miss Jane return from spending Christmas in Hooterville to learn that Drysdale has driven after them, along with Fairchild, Elly’s bear. Back in the hills, Drysdale gets arrested for vagrancy and bootlegging in a place called Ripley. When they learn, the people at the bank couldn’t be happier that their boss has been locked up.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver won't take Lisa to New York for a big party, but the issue isn't over. She conspires with Eb to invent new invisible friends, hoping the scheme will end with a trip to the city to visit a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan blackmails General Burkhalter to keep Klink from being transferred to the Russian front for failing to keep Hogan from blowing up a radio tower.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink suffers at the hands of a tough sergeant sent to discipline prisoners.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Ken Berry And Cass Elliot (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Ken Berry and Cass Elliot. Originally aired on 10/13/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Runaway Racer
programme.desc: Test driver Pete Griston cracks up a vehicle owned by Pappy Ryan. Pappy accuses Havey Rettig of tampering with the car and files charges against Rettig and Griston. Then Rettig is killed and Griston is found standing groggily over the body.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Ernest Mullett is a playboy who loses his job, wife and girlfriend to his hated, overachieving brother, Farnum Mullett. Ernest's hatred turns to murder when he decides to reenact the biblical story of Cain and Abel.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The wife of a money man for the mob is killed during a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "With the help of his former police partner, Frank is asked by his former captain to reopen a case of a corrupt cop who has reappeared after being declared dead years ago."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A rapist threatens to get more violent with Betty's friend if she tells the police.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Two hoodlums attempt to murder their former cellmate by withholding his insulin.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives search out the suppliers of stolen arms for paramilitary groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed have a run-in with a suspected professional jewel thief and fear she will walk due to lack of evidence. They also find themselves in competition with a millionaire vigilante, who provides assistance with apprehending a drunk driver and ending a shootout, but seems destined to soon overstep the law.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are on the lookout for a hype who robbed a hand-made craft store run by elderly women, only to later return the money after robbing an antique store. In the meantime, they engage in a high-speed pursuit, and pull over a priest in possession of marijuana.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward saves an old pedometer from being thrown out and gives it to Beaver, but not before telling him a story about when he was a kid he would walk 20 miles a day. Taking the story literally, Beaver makes a bet with Whitey that he, too, can walk 20 miles in a day.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry and Beaver spend the day at the lake, which is where they encounter two kids who let them borrow their boat. However, little do Larry and Beaver know, the boat is stolen.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Startled Stallion
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher John Brant forecloses on Jo Ann Blanchard's mortgage and takes possession of her prized stallion. Jo Ann goes to Mason for help in getting the horse back but soon needs his aid in getting her off a murder charge.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock vies with a formidable district attorney while defending a client accused of killing a city councilwoman, discovering a secret hiding in the man's past that is affecting his judgment in the case.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Althea thinks Virgil needs a new line of work after seeing the aftermath of a deadly shooting at a roadhouse. Virgil finds himself in danger when they arrest the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy returns to Walton's Mountain to write about the failing economy and lack of jobs

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A train that Matt, Doc and Festus are riding is stopped by Indians who request two passengers be turned over to their custody for selling them poisonous whiskey.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss helps out two young girls, whose father has just died, by taking them on a journey to their Aunt's place. Unbeknownst to Hoss, one of the girls carries a stolen bag of money and he soon finds out that there are others who are interested in both the money and the girls.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Trouble brews at Lucas' when a whisky salesman and a gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When someone yells horse thief, Flint shoots a man only to find he is the husband of a childhood friend. Flint learns the man is mayor and highly respected. The question of whether he killed an innocent man bothers him and the man's son.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A photo shoot at the station gets John excited. A country doctor helps Roy and John when they can't reach Rampart on a call. The paramedics rescue a man drowning in a swimming pool and two stuntmen trapped on a waterfall at a movie studio.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Newscaster Clete Roberts, reprising an earlier interview appearance, returns to update Korean War conditions, when he conducts a series of television talks with the leading characters of the 4077th. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Newscaster Clete Roberts, reprising an earlier interview appearance, returns to update Korean War conditions, when he conducts a series of television talks with the leading characters of the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles becomes so irate when he is turned down for a future medical position at home that he refuses to talk to anyone in the unit, until Hawkeye and B.J. send him a false telegram from home. Meanwhile, a young soldier, Jerry Wilson, can't remember his own identity, so Sidney Freedman is called for help.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As the temperatures reach triple digits, Hawkeye and B.J. receive their new rubber bathtub from Abercrombie & Fitch. However, soon the whole camp is hot under the collar as word leaks out about the tub and everyone wants a dip, except for Klinger, who is trying to get his Section 8 by wearing a fur coat.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: It's canning time again, and Aunt Bee has put up another batch of pickles. After realizing the only thing they're good for is killing flies brave enough to land on them, Andy and Barney decide to substitute store-bought for her homemade.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gets an offer to become the sheriff of Greendale, and Andy tries to discourage him. Unsure how to handle matters, Andy gets the idea to let Barney be sheriff of Mayberry for a day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale has come down with the flu after spending so many nights outside while on the way to Hooterville. Granny wants to help him with her Possum Ridge Penicillin, also known as White Lightening. She leaves Drysdale a jug of it, but he puts it to the side and takes a sleeping pill. However, Elly’s bear Fairchild has taken up drinking Granny’s moonshine and climbs into his room as Drysdale is sleeping and drinks the entire jug.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: According to Oliver, every farm wife should be growing her own vegetables so Lisa starts her own garden. Armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball and a flask of perfume, Lisa begins work. It's hardly a money-saving proposition after she buys a tractor, farm supplies, and hires Alf and Ralph as her housekeepers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan steals a top-secret document from Klink's coat to save him from being arrested.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to let him play camp commander so he can get a French agent released.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Peggy Lee And Dom Deluise
programme.desc: "Guests Peggy Lee and Dom Deluise. Originally aired on 10/20/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Silent Six
programme.desc: Police Sergeant Dave Wolfe warns Joe Oliver to stay away from his kid sister, Susan. Now Susan's been beaten up in her apartment, Oliver has been shot to death and Dave is being charged with murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: And When The Sky Was Opened
programme.desc: When three U.S. astronauts return to Earth after the first flight into space, they begin being erased from history one by one.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Nell Snyder is worried about the bizarre activities of her niece, who claims acquaintance with the "minute people."

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix gets involved with the case of a serial killer after his friend becomes the latest victim. But not all is as it seems when he discovers the killer may not be responsible for every murder.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A group of terrorists have drugged Cannon with a poison, giving him 72 hours to give them a defector and receive the antidote or die."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby probes the supposed suicide of a college professor who had been the victim of his student's pranks.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of Chester W. Farnsworth
programme.desc: Uncle Joe is convinced that the Shady Rest is haunted by a guest who visited 50 years ago, Chester W. Farnsworth.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: That Was The Night That Was
programme.desc: Kate Bradley's Shady Rest is patronized by a guest who gives every indication of being from outer space.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Duke is sick, and Elly calls the "critter doctor" from the zoo. When Jed finds out he is a "college boy," he thinks it is a possible beau for Elly May, not knowing he is a graduate and an older man. Granny is against this doctor coming, and she mistakes a young salesman who is selling bug repellents for the doctor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It is the first day of the Silver Dollar City Fair, and Granny is working on getting Elly May a husband before Elverna Bradshaw’s daughter gets married. The two women continue to fight and argue, challenging one another more and more. But with the excitement of the fair, Elly enters a few contests, and Granny arranges plots to brag about Elly May.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Shiver Me Timbers!, Dizzy Divers, Puppet Love
programme.desc: "Popeye is attracted to an old weather-beaten ship bearing a sign "Ghost Ship - Beware" and he explores it with Olive Oyl and Wimpy as his unwilling companions., Bluto attempts to get to sunken treasure before Popeye can., Popeye wants to propose Olive, but he doesn't have the courage to express his feelings. "

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Flying Sorceress, Bottles, Advance And Be Mechanized
programme.desc: "Tom steals a witch's flying broom so he can scare the wits out of Jerry., An old pharmacist falls asleep in his apothecary and dreams about all of the bottles coming to life with some of them good and some not so good., Tom is a space security guard and he uses his cat robot to chase Jerry's mouse robot as it attempts to sneak some cheese out of the Mining Facility."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Round Trip To Mars, Chilly's Cold War, Swing Your Partner, Phantom Of The Horse Opera, Coming Out Party, The Sleeping Princess, Woody's Magic Touch
programme.desc: "Woody sabotagues Professor Dingledong's Mars rocket so that it won't take off and pretends to be a martian., Chilly Willy is cold and hungry and takes shelter in the home of Colonel Pot Shot where Smedley is the caretaker., Homer drags his horse out of bed to drive his buggy to the barn dance. In anger, Hank breaks up the dance and forces Homer to pull the buggy home., An outlaw disguises himself as a ghost to scare Woody away., Inspector Willoughby repeatedly foils Crash's attempts to escape Sing Song prison., A fairy curses a princess when she's not invited to a royal ceremony., Woody must trick a witch in order to transform the king's son back into a human again."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Abominable Snow Rabbit, Big Game Haunt, Hyde And Go Tweet, Shishkabugs, The Phantom Ship, The Haunted Mouse, Bewitched Bunny
programme.desc: "Bugs and Daffy decide to tunnel underground over to Palm Springs. Wrong directions end them up in the Himalayas where they run into trouble with the Abominable Snowman... , Cool Cat gets chased by Colonel Rimfire into a haunted house. They find a ghost who just wants to be friends, but out of fright they run. , Sylvester is sleeping on the ledge outside the office of Dr. Jekyll (whom we see in his office drinking the potion that turns him into a monster). , Yosemite Sam is working as a king's chef when he is asked to prepare a dish made from rabbit. When Bugs Bunny comes over to borrow carrots, Sam decides that Bugs would be perfect for the recipe. , Beans and his stowaway nephews, Ham and Ex, search for a lost treasure on a haunted ship in the frozen North. , A hungry cat goes to a restaurant in search of food. A ghost mouse sees the cat's arrival as an opportunity to get back at all the cats from his life. , Bugs enters the fairytale world to go save Hanzel and Grettel from the witch. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Infernal Machine
programme.desc: A federal judge is threatened by a bomb-throwing clockmaker.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill Hawkes is leading three wagons through indian territory. They run into trouble with Mexician bandits lead by Lee Marvin. When the two groups must band together to fight off an indian attack, certain biases and assumptions are thrown away.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria sells land to an old friend who has deeply sentimental reasons for owning it, despite the fact that her own sons are part of a plan to flood that land with waters from a dam.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: As Luke Dangerfield lies shot and dying, he requests that his protégé, Austin, brings him to Dodge so he can see his estranged daughter one last time.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is seriously injured on a cattle drive and Ben takes him to a nearby town in search of a doctor. To his dismay, Ben finds out that the only doctor available is in jail, waiting to be hung for murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Simon Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once traded shots.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Sam Jefferson aids Rowdy after his horse takes a spill. Sam is a wanted man and asks Rowdy to turn him in but give the $5,000 reward to his wife.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Kovak is reserving the entire hotel in Laredo, Texas for Sam Tuttle, a famous unbeatable gunfighter. After Paladin is forced to kill Kovak, Tuttle must challenge Paladin in order to keep his reputation intact.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A rancher hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft. The accused man's father accompanies Randall on the trek to the remote shack where the thief is thought to be hiding.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Hugs And Mugs, Punchy Cowpunchers, Pest Man Wins, Commotion On The Ocean, Hot Ice, Tooth Will Out
programme.desc: "The Stooges run a furniture store and come into possession of a stolen pearl necklace. Three crooked dames convince the boys that the necklace is theirs, and when the real thieves arrive, the Stooges fight to defend the girl's property. The Stooges defeat the bad guys and the girls decide to go honest and return the necklace to its rightful owner. , Set in the old west, the Stooges are three soldiers assigned to go undercover and spy on an outlaw gang that's terrorizing a nearby town. The bad guys have the Arizona Kid locked up, so the boys set about rescuing him with the help of beautiful Nell, his girl. They free the kid, and he rides to summon help. The Stooges, with the help of Nell, manage to subdue the bad guys before the kid arrives with the cavalry. , The Stooges graduate from dental school and go out west to open a practice. Everything goes well until Shemp "cures" an outlaw's toothache from the instructions in a carpentry book, and the boys must leave on the run. , The Stooges are pest exterminators who drum up business by planting vermin in a ritzy mansion where a party is going on. The boys are hired, but must dress as guests to work unobserved. They disrupt the party and a wild pie fight ensues. [Basically a remake of "Ants in the Pantry". ] , The Stooges are would-be reporters, who are tricked into becoming stowaways by "Borscht", a spy for an enemy country. Stranded on a freighter on the high seas, they discover that Borscht has concealed some stolen microfilm in watermelons they brought aboard for him. After a wild chase, they subdue Borscht and recover the microfilm. , The Stooges apply for job as 'Yard Men' at Scotland Yard, thinking they'll become detectives, but instead wind up as gardeners. When they accidentally see a memo about the theft a famous diamond, the boys decide to go after the crooks. They find the crooks, but Shemp accidentally swallows the diamond, which was hidden in a bowl of candy. The bad guys want to cut the diamond out, but the boys foil them with the help of a friendly gorilla. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A young boy learns that space aliens are taking over the minds of earthlings."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world."

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A Hindu Rakshasa terrorizes a Jewish neighborhood.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A witch desires to control the world of high fashion.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: Bent on revenge, a headless motorcycle rider murders those who wronged him.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: Defrosted ancient cell samples discovered in the Arctic grow into savage prehistoric primates and go on a rampage.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: The first based on a Native American legend, a Diablero shaman spirit murders for jewels to pay back his debt and be released from his Earthly bonds.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matt and Walt race to find the landing device before astronauts perish in the re-entry."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After Zack spies on Kelly, trying to hear who'll she'll take to the dance, she sets up a prank to get even.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Trying to cheer Screech up so he'll complete their science project, Zack pretends to know a girl who is interested in him.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After a freak accident, Screech can predict the future, an ability Zack uses to his advantage.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Lisa splurges with her dad's credit card, she asks the Bayside gang to help get the money back before her dad discovers the shopping spree.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack and Slater bet on who can kiss Tori first, and their best chance will come at a masquerade ball. Lisa has a secret admirer, Screech, but she thinks it's Zack.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The gang wins a mystery weekend at a mansion where they will all play a part in a murder mystery. The trouble begins when the game goes awry and Zack is left as the prime suspect.

programme.title: House of Svengoolie's Cartoon BOO-Nanza
programme.desc: "A collection of Halloween themed cartoons hosted by the The Sven Squad."

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie has to have his tonsils removed and will miss a big Halloween party.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Learning that her appendix is about to burst but not wanting to lose her part in "Alice in Wonderland," Shirley hides while the rest of the play's actors try to find her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jeff Pruitt, a farmer from the hills, comes to Mayberry in search of a wife. He enlists Barney and Andy's help and ends up picking Thelma Lou!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.sub-title: Lucy Thinks Ricky Is Trying To Murder Her
programme.desc: Lucy is deeply engrossed in a brand-new whodunit, called "The Mockingbird Mystery," and is, understandably, a nail-biting wreck. Having become deeply paranoid that she is in for an imminent doom, Lucy begins to believe that Ricky is trying to murder her.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While his class is reciting a poem about trees, Beaver remembers a tree that Ward had given him for his birthday when they lived at their old house. Wanting "his" tree back, Beaver and Larry go to Beaver's old home and promptly dig it up.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets a surprise when June invites Miss Landers over for dinner and Larry convinces him that something bad might happen. This leads Beaver to become a nervous wreck as he tries to make sure his parents don't do anything to embarrass him. Meanwhile, Larry charges a quarter to anyone who wants to spy on Miss Landers eating dinner at the Cleavers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her search to get a man for Elly, though fears her mission might be harder with Elly having entered the cake-baking contest. Back at the mansion, Jethro becomes restless in Beverly Hills and decides to join his family in the hills, especially after hearing about the fair going on. Miss Jane comes along, being told by Drysdale to keep her watch on the family and not to let Elly get serious about a man.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Countess Maria comes to Beverly Hills, making Mrs. Drysdale very excited. But she wants to keep the countess away from the hillbillies. However, it's spring tonic time, and Granny passes it around the neighborhood, including at Countess Maria's house. She falls in love with the brew and visits the Clampetts. They become friends instantly. She starts falling for Jed, and has plans to marry her 6th husband, hoping it is an American.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A famous Hollywood producer crash-lands on the island. When he insults Ginger, the castaways stage a "Hamlet" musical play to restore her confidence.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A witch doctor makes voodoo dolls from the castaways' personal affects, which he has stolen from their huts.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The sudden appearance of Carl's nomadic brother, Roy, excites everyone but Mama. Although she seems upset that Roy is popular with the rest of the family, she finally admits her affection for him.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Aunt Fran is temporarily given the responsibility of writing an advice column in the local newspaper. Unfortunately, she doesn't have any good advice and comes to rely on Mama to supply material.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Promoter / Judges / Family Plan / Forever Engaged / May The Best Man Win (part 1)
programme.desc: "Part 1. A "Marriage-A-Thon" cruise has 25 engaged couples competing for prizes before a mass wedding."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie joins a secret club that meets in Jubal Foster's barn. When Jubal burns his own barn down, he attempts to blame the group of boys.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.sub-title: Rich Correll- Horror/sci-fi Movie Props And Costumes
programme.desc: "Rich Correll built a successful career as a comedy actor, director, and producer, but a lifelong passion for horror inspired him to collect some of the Hollywood’s most iconic horror, sci-fi, and fantasy props and costumes. With Rich at her side, Lisa tours Icons of Darkness, a museum where Rich displays hundreds of his favorite pieces for the public to enjoy, like the original raptor from Jurassic Park (1993) and the coveted, highly valuable original Xenomorph costume from Alien (1979). His collection celebrates movie history from the Universal Monster classics to the fun and futuristic hits like Back To The Future. Hollywood memorabilia appraiser and expert, Joe Moe, assigns the highest ever value in Collector’s Call history to Rich’s collection and brings a remnant of Rich’s childhood to offer in trade for an equally rare artifact from Jurassic Park."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A strong windstorm affects the M*A*S*H personnel in varying ways: Hawkeye and most of the unit busy themselves securing items that could blow away; Radar prepares his animal hutch for the worst; a disgusted Charles switches his Tokyo-leave transportation from air to ground and runs into a difficult medical situation en route to Seoul.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Captain Tom Greenleigh of "Stars and Stripes" comes to the 4077th to write an article about Charles, which makes him act even more egotistical than usual.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are having a discussion over who will take care of Joey, just in case there comes a time when both of them are unable to care for the little tyke before his 18th birthday. Mike has serious reservations over allowing in-laws Archie and Edith to get custody of Joey, particularly due to what he perceives as Archie's bad influences. Gloria is having a hard time convincing Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith saves a man's life and becomes the toast of the town,but Archie isn't happy standing in the shadow of her limelight.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith discovers Archie once had a brief encounter with an old high school friend she's invited to dinner.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie enters Joey in a newspaper's beautiful baby contest, against the express wishes of Mike and Gloria.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Alice Ghostley And Jim Nabors
programme.desc: "Guests Alice Ghostley and Jim Nabors. Originally aired on 09/23/68."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Tim Conway And Diahann Carroll (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Tim Conway and Diahann Carroll. Originally aired on 10/27/71."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Did Rob see a UFO?

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura tries to spend the night alone while her family is on a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Alice is baby-sitting to pay for a phone but Ralph thinks she's two-timing him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Three nurses care for a patient in a creaky old manor where more than a few nurses have been killed in the past.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Working as a stock clerk in a department store, Kimble witnesses his boss, Martin Rowland, accidentally kill a business associate in the parking lot after hours. When Kimble learns that a local vagrant found near the crime scene is the prime suspect, Kimb

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Vincente Bravo, dictator of Nueva Tierra, is planning an invasion against a neighboring democracy, San Cristobal. The United Peoples' Republic is sending Nikor Janos with a coded invasion plan to help Bravo and set him up as puppet dictator.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: The Highway Patrol exposes a ruthless man who operates a professional hideout for criminals.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The problems of policemen's wives.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police go after a college student who has turned to murder.
